name: Windsor Island Golf Center
address: 6020 Windsor Island Rd N, Keizer, OR 97303
about: Windsor Island Golf Center and Driving Range is a premier golf facility in Keizer, Oregon, located just north of Salem. It is recognized as the state's best option for honing your swing or short game while also providing modern equipment to elevate your golf game. The facility includes a driving range with 27 covered artificial hitting mats, a grass tee area, putting and chipping areas, a bunker, and stadium lighting, complemented by a full-service pro shop. Their indoor golf simulator is powered by SKYTRAK technology and offers realistic play anytime, rain or shine. The center provides services such as club repairs, lessons, and clinics, making it a comprehensive destination for golfers of all levels looking to improve their skills or enjoy a round on a world-class course.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art SKYTRAK powered simulator for realistic play
Comprehensive facility with driving range, putting/chipping areas, and simulator bays
Full-service pro shop and expert club fitting services
Variety of services including lessons, clinics, and club repairs
Available for individual practice, group play, and weekly leagues

simulator_hardware.notes: Awarded editor's choice for best launch monitor, featured in Golf Digest, Golf Monthly, and Today's Golfer

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, but it is common practice for simulator venues to have rental clubs available or allow you to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on bringing food or drinks, so it is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round, but typical simulator sessions can range from 1 to 2 hours depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be family-friendly as it is open to all skill levels and mentions couples who are beginners enjoying the facility.
